sglang.title: Fix DP attention worker port binding for IPv6 support
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
The old code used get_zmq_socket which binds to tcp://* — this is IPv4-only in ZMQ (no zmq.IPV6 flag set), so DP attention worker PUSH sockets are unreachable on IPv6-only networks.
Switch to get_zmq_socket_on_host with the host derived from dist_init_addr, which properly detects IPv6, sets

sglang.title: [Fix] XGrammarGrammarBackend reset to clear inherited cache
sglang.author: YzXiao101
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
BaseGrammarBackend.reset() clears the Python-side grammar cache, but XGrammarGrammarBackend.reset() only clears the xgrammar compiler cache. This means Scheduler.flush_cache() does not fully clear grammar cache state on the xgrammar path.
Modifications

call super().reset() in XGrammarGra

sglang.title: dp: add profile req hook
sglang.author: happierpig
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Bug: With enable_dp_attention, ProfileReq has no explicit dispatcher entry and falls through to send_control_message(), which sends to workers[::control_message_step] where
control_message_step = tp_size. With e.g. tp_size=8 and dp_size=2, this resolves to workers[::8] → only workers[0] r

sglang.title: [Diffusion] Fix weight scale swizzle and add large-M kernel config for FLUX.2-dev-NVFP4
sglang.author: RubiaCx
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Two bugs in the diffusion FLUX.2-dev-NVFP4 path:

ModelOptFp4LinearMethod.process_weights_after_loading() was missing the blockwise interleave (swizzle) required by CUTLASS TMA kernels. The CUTLASS fallback path silently produced wrong results, caused ~5% cosine-similarity drop vs cuDNN.

sglang.title: Add `--stream-response-default-include-usage` server flag
sglang.author: syd520zy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When streaming is enabled, usage info is only returned if the client sets stream_options.include_usage = true. Server operators who need token-level monitoring metrics cannot rely on clients to set this. This PR adds a server-side flag to force usage inclusion in streaming responses.

vllm.title: [CPU] Replace OMP initialization
vllm.author: kot-begemot-uk

OMP initializes on-load based on environment variables. Once it has initialized changing the environment has no effect.
Additionally, using POSIX set/get affinity calls from inside an OMP thread is ill advised at best. It may and does cause vllm to hang later in some configurations. It is also point

vllm.author: arpera
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Eliminate a GPU→CPU sync caused by .tolist() inside prepare_chunk_indices during GDN prefill.
prepare_chunk_indices (in vllm/model_executor/layers/fla/ops/index.py) calls .tolist() on a GPU tensor, which triggers a blocking GPU→CPU synchronization. The function is decorated with tensor_cache

vllm.title: [Kernel] Add swapAB support for SM120 CUTLASS blockwise FP8 GEMM
vllm.author: Nekofish-L
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR adds swap AB kernel support for the SM120 (Blackwell) blockwise FP8 scaled GEMM.
For decode-phase workloads and small-batch inference, the M dimension of the GEMM is very small. Without swap AB, the tile partitioning along M is highly inefficient — most threads within a CTA tile are

vllm.title: Refactor Arctic loading to use AutoWeightsLoader
vllm.author: lalit10
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Refactor ArcticForCausalLM weight loading to use AutoWeightsLoader as part of #15697.
This moves Arctic-specific weight remapping logic from ArcticForCausalLM.load_weights into ArcticModel.load_weights, keeps lm_head handling at the ForCausalLM level, and updates MoE layer detection during l
